text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 29. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
